ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- java!bench_target::SysUtil::systemInfo()
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- java!bench_target::SysUtil::exec(payload.command)
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {ok: true, ts: now() as Number {unit: "milliseconds"}}

%dw 2.0 output application/json var backend = read(payload, "application/json") var totalMs = now() as Number {unit: "milliseconds"} - vars.proxyStart --- { ok: true, backendMs: backend.elapsedMs, totalMs: totalMs, muleOverheadMs: totalMs - backend.elapsedMs }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var backend = read(payload, "application/json") var totalMs = now() as Number {unit: "milliseconds"} - vars.proxyStart var sizeKB = (attributes.queryParams.sizeKB default "1") as Number var padding = "X" * (sizeKB * 1024) --- { ok: true, backendMs: backend.elapsedMs, totalMs: totalMs, muleOverheadMs: totalMs - backend.elapsedMs, sizeKB: sizeKB, data: padding }

db:select.doc:name: Select Product
db:select.db:sql: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, UNIT, UNIT_PRICE, IS_ACTIVE FROM MDM_PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCT_ID = :pid

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (sizeOf(payload) > 0) { productId: payload[0].PRODUCT_ID, productCode: payload[0].PRODUCT_CODE, productName: payload[0].PRODUCT_NAME, productType: payload[0].PRODUCT_TYPE, unit: payload[0].UNIT, unitPrice: payload[0].UNIT_PRICE, isActive: payload[0].IS_ACTIVE } else {error: "not found"}

db:select.doc:name: Select All Products
db:select.db:sql: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_TYPE, UNIT, UNIT_PRICE, IS_ACTIVE FROM MDM_PRODUCTS

db:select.doc:name: Select User
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, region, created_at FROM perf_users WHERE id = :id

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (sizeOf(payload) > 0) payload[0] else {error: "not found"}

db:select.doc:name: Select Users
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, region, created_at FROM perf_users WHERE region = :region

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Order
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO perf_orders (item, qty, price) VALUES (:item, :qty, :price)

db:select.doc:name: Select Created
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, item, qty, price, created_at FROM perf_orders WHERE ROWID = :rid

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload[0] default {ok: true}

db:select.doc:name: Oracle JOIN Query
db:select.db:sql: SELECT u.region, u.department, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count, SUM(o.qty * o.unit_price) AS total_amount, AVG(o.qty * o.unit_price) AS avg_amount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) AS delivered_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) AS cancelled_count FROM bench_users u INNER JOIN bench_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.region, u.department ORDER BY total_amount DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var rows = payload var byRegion = rows groupBy $.REGION --- { totalGroups: sizeOf(rows), grandTotal: rows reduce ((r, acc=0) -> acc + (r.TOTAL_AMOUNT default 0)), byRegion: byRegion mapObject ((items, region) -> (region): { departments: sizeOf(items), totalAmount: items reduce ((r, acc=0) -> acc + (r.TOTAL_AMOUNT default 0)), totalOrders: items reduce ((r, acc=0) -> acc + (r.ORDER_COUNT default 0)) }), details: rows }

db:select.doc:name: Clouderby JOIN Query
db:select.db:sql: SELECT u.region, u.department, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count, SUM(o.qty * o.unit_price) AS total_amount, AVG(o.qty * o.unit_price) AS avg_amount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'delivered' THEN 1 END) AS delivered_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) AS cancelled_count FROM bench_users u INNER JOIN bench_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.region, u.department ORDER BY total_amount DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var rows = payload var byRegion = rows groupBy $.REGION --- { totalGroups: sizeOf(rows), grandTotal: rows reduce ((r, acc=0) -> acc + (r.TOTAL_AMOUNT default 0)), byRegion: byRegion mapObject ((items, region) -> (region): { departments: sizeOf(items), totalAmount: items reduce ((r, acc=0) -> acc + (r.TOTAL_AMOUNT default 0)), totalOrders: items reduce ((r, acc=0) -> acc + (r.ORDER_COUNT default 0)) }), details: rows }

%dw 2.0 output application/java var count = vars.insertCount var items = ["Widget", "Gadget", "Gizmo", "Doohickey", "Thingamajig"] var statuses = ["pending", "shipped", "delivered", "cancelled"] --- (1 to count) map ((i) -> { user_id: ((i - 1) mod 150) + 1, item: items[(i - 1) mod 5], qty: ((i * 3) mod 20) + 1, unit_price: (100 + ((i * 13) mod 9900)) / 100, status: statuses[(i - 1) mod 4] })

db:bulk-insert.doc:name: Bulk Insert Orders
db:bulk-insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO bench_orders (user_id, item, qty, unit_price, status) VALUES (:user_id, :item, :qty, :unit_price, :status)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {ok: true, inserted: vars.recordCount}

%dw 2.0 output application/java var count = vars.insertCount var items = ["Widget", "Gadget", "Gizmo", "Doohickey", "Thingamajig"] var statuses = ["pending", "shipped", "delivered", "cancelled"] --- (1 to count) map ((i) -> { user_id: ((i - 1) mod 150) + 1, item: items[(i - 1) mod 5], qty: ((i * 3) mod 20) + 1, unit_price: (100 + ((i * 13) mod 9900)) / 100, status: statuses[(i - 1) mod 4] })

db:bulk-insert.doc:name: Bulk Insert Orders
db:bulk-insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO bench_orders (user_id, item, qty, unit_price, status) VALUES (:user_id, :item, :qty, :unit_price, :status)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {ok: true, inserted: vars.recordCount}

db:select.doc:name: Select Page
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, region, department, salary FROM bench_users ORDER BY id OFFSET :offset ROWS FETCH NEXT :pageSize ROWS ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { page: vars.page, pageSize: vars.pageSize, count: sizeOf(payload), users: payload }

db:select.doc:name: Select Page
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, name, email, region, department, salary FROM bench_users ORDER BY id OFFSET :offset ROWS FETCH NEXT :pageSize ROWS ONLY

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { page: vars.page, pageSize: vars.pageSize, count: sizeOf(payload), users: payload }

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Account
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Industry, Type, BillingCity, BillingCountry, NumberOfEmployees, AnnualRevenue FROM Account WHERE Name = ':name' LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (sizeOf(payload) > 0) payload[0] else {error: "not found", name: vars.accountName}

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Accounts
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Industry, Type, BillingCity, BillingCountry, NumberOfEmployees, AnnualRevenue FROM Account ORDER BY Name LIMIT 100

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- [{ FirstName: payload.firstName default "Perf", LastName: payload.lastName default ("Test_" ++ uuid()), Email: payload.email default ("perf_" ++ uuid() ++ "@test.example.com"), Title: payload.title default "Benchmark Contact" }]
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: payload[0].successful default payload[0].success, id: payload[0].id default payload[0].Id }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {error: "not found", path: vars.path}

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create perf_users
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE perf_users ( id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR2(100), email VARCHAR2(200), region VARCHAR2(10), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

logger.message: perf_users already exists or error creating

db:execute-ddl.doc:name: Create perf_orders
db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE perf_orders ( id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, item VARCHAR2(100), qty NUMBER, price NUMBER, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

logger.message: perf_orders already exists or error creating

db:select.doc:name: Check existing data
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM perf_users

db:execute-script.doc:name: Seed Data

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {setup: "complete", tablesCreated: ["perf_users", "perf_orders"], usersSeeded: 150}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {setup: "skipped", reason: "data already exists"}

db:execute-ddl.db:sql: CREATE TABLE bench_users ( id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR2(100), email VARCHAR2(200), region VARCHAR2(10), department VARCHAR2(50), salary NUMBER )

CREATE TABLE bench_orders ( id NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_id NUMBER, item VARCHAR2(100), qty NUMBER, unit_price NUMBER(10,2), status VARCHAR2(20), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
CREATE TABLE bench_users ( id INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), email VARCHAR(200), region VARCHAR(10), department VARCHAR(50), salary INT )

CREATE TABLE bench_orders ( id INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, item VARCHAR(100), qty INT, unit_price DECIMAL(10,2), status VARCHAR(20), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

db:select.doc:name: Check Oracle data
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bench_users

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var regions = ["JP", "US", "EU"] var suffixes = ["jp", "com", "eu"] var depts = ["Sales", "Engineering", "Marketing", "Support", "HR"] --- flatten(regions map ((region, ri) -> (1 to 50) map ((n) -> { name: "User_" ++ region ++ "_" ++ (n as String), email: "user_" ++ region ++ "_" ++ (n as String) ++ "@example." ++ suffixes[ri], region: region, department: depts[(n - 1) mod 5], salary: 30000 + ((n * 7) mod 50000) }) ))

db:bulk-insert.doc:name: Seed Oracle Users
db:bulk-insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO bench_users (name, email, region, department, salary) VALUES (:name, :email, :region, :department, :salary)

db:bulk-insert.doc:name: Seed Clouderby Users
db:bulk-insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO bench_users (name, email, region, department, salary) VALUES (:name, :email, :region, :department, :salary)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var items = ["Widget", "Gadget", "Gizmo", "Doohickey", "Thingamajig"] var statuses = ["pending", "shipped", "delivered", "cancelled"] --- (1 to 500) map ((i) -> { user_id: ((i - 1) mod 150) + 1, item: items[(i - 1) mod 5], qty: ((i * 3) mod 20) + 1, unit_price: (100 + ((i * 13) mod 9900)) / 100, status: statuses[(i - 1) mod 4] })

db:bulk-insert.doc:name: Seed Oracle Orders
db:bulk-insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO bench_orders (user_id, item, qty, unit_price, status) VALUES (:user_id, :item, :qty, :unit_price, :status)

db:bulk-insert.doc:name: Seed Clouderby Orders
db:bulk-insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO bench_orders (user_id, item, qty, unit_price, status) VALUES (:user_id, :item, :qty, :unit_price, :status)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {setup: "complete", tables: ["bench_users", "bench_orders"], usersSeeded: 150, ordersSeeded: 500, databases: ["oracle", "clouderby"]}
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- {setup: "skipped", reason: "data already exists"}
